title: aspidium lobatum
intro: Aspidium lobatum, also known as the Lady fern or Lobed Lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antidote for various poisonings. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Aspidium lobatum are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, while the rhizome is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
